Our Story

We're not a logistics company
that started in a boardroom.
We started on the floor.

SkidFlow was founded in 2025 by two partners who built their careers on the warehouse floor — not in a boardroom. Each with 7 years of hands-on experience as supervisors and crew leads, they've personally handled over 11,000 containers across Greater Vancouver.

They know the pressure of peak season. They know what happens when a third-party crew doesn't care. They know exactly where things go wrong — and they built SkidFlow to make sure they don't.

Two owners. One standard: no excuses, no shortcuts, no wasted time. Every client gets the same level of accountability our founders demanded of themselves on the floor.

7+
Years on the floor
What We Do

Two offerings.
Zero shortcuts.

Every service is built around how your operation actually runs — not how we wish it did.

01
Service 01

Container Unloading & Loading

One 20ft or a full schedule of 40ft HCs — we move it with speed, care, and accountability. Floor-loaded, palletized, or mixed freight: your timeline is our deadline. Every container treated like it's the only one.

20ft & 40ft HCs Floor-loaded Palletized Mixed freight
Service 02

Strategic Warehouse Management

Your warehouse has potential your current operation isn't reaching. We go in, assess the gaps, and build a system that actually works — faster throughput, coordinated teams, and operations that run clean even on the hardest days.

Workflow design Team coordination Throughput optimization
02
Our Edge

The difference you feel
from day one.

01

Speed Without Sacrifice

We unload faster than the industry average — because we've studied every bottleneck on the floor. Fast doesn't mean careless. It means experienced.

02

Operators, Not Brokers

We've supervised the exact operations we now run for clients. Seven years of floor-level decisions means we don't learn on your time.

03

Built Around Your Reality

Your warehouse isn't generic — our service isn't either. We shape our approach around your volumes, your layout, your team. No template, no guesswork.

04

A New Bar for Vancouver

The Lower Mainland hasn't seen logistics executed at this level. We're not here to compete — we're here to set the standard.

How We Work

From first call
to full operation.

Step 01

Discovery Call

We start with a real conversation — your operation, your pain points, your goals. No scripts, no sales pitch.

Step 02

Operation Analysis

We assess your volumes, workflows, and pressure points so we know exactly where we can make the biggest impact.

Step 03

Tailored Integration

We design a service plan built around how your warehouse runs — not a copy-paste from someone else's playbook.

Step 04

Execution & Improvement

We get to work — and we don't stop improving. Every week we look for ways to make your operation tighter than the week before.
